posts.author: FlorianASG (Florian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

I hope someone can help me it seems to be an easy thing but I cant find out how to move an Item from a board to another board using Make / Integromat. The function is not available. (or I cant find it)

Maybe there is some kind of Workaround.

Task in general:

  • Duplicate Item with subitems and updates (no problemo)
  • Move the duplicate to Board B

Thanks
Florian

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@FlorianASG ,

If you want to move an item to another board you can do the following steps
1.watch events.
2.Get an item.
3.Create item.(another board).
4.Delete item from 1st bord.

Screenshot (16)1240×535 56.3 KB
